text: Hi Vijay, i am from Hivericks. I see we spoke recently. Is now a good time?
Yes, it is a good time.
Let's move forward with the XOptimus Smart Charger installation.
Yes. Actually I want to know the details.

XOptimus Smart Charger (Wall Adapter) is a device designed to increase Li-Ion battery life expectancy and performance by saving energy through optimal charge levels, preventing overcharging and heating issues, and maintaining real-time parameters for safe charging.
Wait, wait, I want to know the price?
XOptimus Smart Charger (Wall Adapter) is available at $49.99 for the standard model and $69.99 for the premium model with additional features.
I can provide you with the revised version with Indian rupees.
